title: UPSSSC – Sugarcane Supervisor – 1182 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1182 Posts
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1182 vacancies across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-07-2026, and closes on 28-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ganna Adhisthan and Chini Adhisthan, Govt. of Uttar Pradesh

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4; Minimum Pay: Rs. 25,500/- | Maximum Pay: Rs. 81,100/-

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the UPSSSC Online Application System at the official website https://upsssc.gov.in. Hard copy/offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. Candidates must login using their PET-2025 Registration Number via OTP sent to their registered mobile/email. All personal information filled during PET-2025 (name, father's name, category, EWS, reservation details, DOB, gender, marital status, contact number, email etc.) will be pre-filled and auto-displayed - these cannot be modified. Candidates must fill in educational qualification details in Section-II of the application. After filling all sections and entering the Verification Code, clicking "Submit" will display the Application Form with an 11-digit registration number - candidates must take a printout and keep it safely. The application form correction window will be open up to 04-08-2026.
seo_tags: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026
